title: 4 pcs Beach Towel Clips, URAQT Towel Pegs, Large Towel Clips and Bright Color Plastic Quilt Clips for Sunbeds, Sun Loungers, Pool Chairs, Laundry and More
features: Multipurpose Use: Perfect for clamping your towels on sunbeds, sun loungers, pool chairs; or for clamping quilt, sheet, curtain or clothes.
Minimalist and Durable Design: Lightweight, sturdy, portable beach towel clip. Strong quilt clips with Windproof and Anti-slip Design. Strong jaw and springs ensure strong holding power.
Jumbo size & Large dimension: 12*9*2 cm (opening 7,3 cm). Strong jaw and springs ensure strong holding power which can keep your towels and clothing from blowing away in a windy day.
Multi-packaging: Package includes 12pcs of large clips in 4 bright colors (Yellow x 3, Blue x 3, Rose x 3, Green x 3). Bright color towel clips make it easy to find if it get lost.
Home or Travel - Perfect for everyday use, home or travel. Lightweight with sturdy build, convenient for storing and carrying anywhere.
description: Product Description Made of brand new PP, light, and easy to carry. Non-slip design for easy operation. Simple lever principle to achieve a maximum fixing effect. The non-slip design on the top of the clip can be used for shoes with low friction. Smooth galvanized steel, anti-rust, not easy to scratch.
